# GrowthDialer

## Company Name
GrowthDialer

## Description
AI-powered autonomous B2B sales dialer

## Key Features
- parallel dialing
- AI voice calling
- autonomous agent
- 16 languages
- omnichannel outreach

## Use Cases
- SDR teams
- agencies
- B2B sales teams
- revenue operations

## Pricing
starts at $29/month

## Competitors Replaced
- KrispCall
- DandyDialer
- PowerDialer.ai
- Orum
- Nooks

## Website
https://growthdialer.com
